description: Designs and audits Storybook-driven frontend component workflows, story coverage, mocks, docs, interaction tests, accessibility checks, and visual baselines.

changes: Import the Storybook frontend design and component development standard as a managed installable skill.
Package the long-form standard as a reference and include compact Storybook examples for reuse.
Normalize the project-level preview example to TSX when decorators use JSX.
